summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P1 (Enhanced Dispute Creation Form) and P2 (Enhanced Audit Trail) features. All 25 backend API tests passed (100%). All P1/P2 enhancements verified working in UI via Playwright E2E tests.
critical_code_review_comments: All P1 and P2 enhancements implemented correctly
Priority selector (LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH/CRITICAL) works end-to-end with color-coded badges
Respondent name/email fields persist correctly to database
All 8 dispute types available and functional
Audit trail event type filter dropdown works
Audit row expansion shows metadata correctly
Stats cards update in real-time after dispute creation
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_qldb.py - Added 9 new tests for P1/P2 enhancements
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test disputes including UI_E2E_986dea5d with HIGH priority, EUR currency, and respondent data
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 and P2 enhancements fully tested. Current data: 29 disputes, 29 audit entries. Test disputes prefixed with TEST_ or UI_E2E_. New data-testid attributes verified: select-priority, select-currency, input-respondent-name, input-respondent-email, audit-event-type-filter, audit-filters.

disputes_tab.status_badges: PASS - OPEN badge with red/coral color
disputes_tab.priority_badges: PASS - LOW (blue), MEDIUM (yellow), HIGH (orange) badges visible

audit_trail_tab.color_coded_badges: PASS - Created badge with green color
audit_trail_tab.expandable_rows: PASS - P2 ENHANCEMENT shows Entity Type, Actor ID, Change Summary, Metadata JSON
audit_trail_tab.stats_cards: PASS - Audit Entries (29), Last 24h, Chain Verified (Yes)

e2e_dispute_creation.form_fill: PASS - All fields filled including HIGH priority and respondent
e2e_dispute_creation.list_update: PASS - New dispute appears in list
e2e_dispute_creation.persistence: PASS - API GET confirms respondent data stored
